emails.subject: RE: Litigation Counsel Approval - Lakeside Packers
emails.body: RE: Litigation Counsel Approval Lakeside Packers Peter, your proposed counsel picks are fine by me. Jim

emails.subject: Litigation Counsel Approval - Lakeside Packers
emails.body: FYI, following-up on this matter, after discussing the matter with their counsel and confronted with a $3.5MM lawsuit, Lakeside acknowledged the deal and executed our paper. Regards, Peter. Forwarded by Peter Keohane/CAL/ECT on 05/11/2001 01:25 PM Enron Capital Trade Resources Canada Corp. From: Peter Keohane 04/30/2001 10:26 AM
